title: my backtest leaderboard found a "perfect" combo and its probably lying
author: Important_Buy626
selftext:
ok so i ran a strategy idea through a tool that tests a few thousand param combinations at once. cant code so this is the only way i do this stuff

the top result had a sharpe that was honestly too good. looked closer and the params were clearly tuned to print during 2021. like it found the one config that worked in that exact regime and nothing else

so now im stuck. did i find an edge or did i just find a prettier way to curve fit

i dont trust it but i also kinda want to believe it lol. anyway havent gone live with it, too scared

anyone experienced with automation trading and can help out in the dms?  
you can just drop your tips in the comments i would really apprecitae it too
